SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-18-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BARBARA SAMUEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEFFREY ADDINGTON IS PRESENT. THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING ASSISTED BY THE MEDIATORS. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL 18TH HEARING THE MATTER TO BE CONTINUED ONE MORE TIME AFTER OCT 15TH 2019. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE OCT 2019 HEARING, MATTER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
